query: SELECT id, trade_name, scientific_name FROM drug_lens LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT id, trade_name, scientific_name FROM drug_lens LIMIT 20;

rows.trade_name: TYMLOS 2 mg/mL Solution for Injection (Pre-filled Pen)
ORENCIA 250 mg Powder Solution for Infusion
